pdg_node.statement: (sub_diagonal: Sequence[float], diagonal: Sequence[float], super_diagonal: Sequence[float], rhs: Sequence[float]) -> list[float]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Solve a tridiagonal system using quantfin's tdmaSolver contract.

declaration.name: tdma_solver
declaration.type_signature: (sub_diagonal: Sequence[float], diagonal: Sequence[float], super_diagonal: Sequence[float], rhs: Sequence[float]) -> list[float]
declaration.docstring: Solve a tridiagonal linear system with the Thomas algorithm.
declaration.raw_code: tdmaSolver aL bL cL dL = ... forward sweep ... back substitution

pdg_node.statement: (aggregator: Callable[[Sequence[float]], float], length: int, vectors: Sequence[Sequence[float]]) -> list[float]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Apply an aggregator to each index-aligned slice across a vector container.

declaration.name: cotraverse_vec
declaration.type_signature: (aggregator: Callable[[Sequence[float]], float], length: int, vectors: Sequence[Sequence[float]]) -> list[float]
declaration.docstring: Aggregate index-aligned slices across a container of vectors.
declaration.raw_code: cotraverseVec f l m = U.map (\i -> f (fmap (U.!i) m)) (U.enumFromN 0 l)
